payload.label: refrigerator
payload.long_description: Frontal view of a stainless steel side-by-side double-door refrigerator with vertical dark handles and a reflective metallic finish that shows room reflections; small logo/badge on the upper-right door; lower front is partially occluded by a foreground object and slightly cropped at the bottom; estimated distance from camera ~1.5 m.
